package.name: m_ahe_recovery_manager
package.description: Recovery manager node for AHE-MRTA. Monitors robot failures, unreachable goals, deadline risk, battery criticality, and congestion-induced delays. Publishes AllocationEvent messages and triggers event-triggered replanning via /system/replan_trigger. Replanning triggers: robot failure, goal unreachable, battery critical, deadline risk threshold exceeded, allocation instability threshold exceeded.
